title: Brotein git merge conflict — Claude resolving 3 ViewModels (Analysis, FoodScanner, NutritionLabel)
html:
Claude (or Copilot-style assistant) walking Yahir through resolving merge conflicts in three Brotein ViewModels after pulling remote changes: AnalysisViewModel.swift, FoodScannerViewModel.swift, NutritionLabelViewModel.swift. Picks the local "improved, user-friendly error messages" branch over the remote's older specifics. Diff shows the <<<<<<< HEAD ... ======= ... >>>>>>> ac6de15 (Fix: Improve error handling and fix build errors) pattern around an if let apiError = error as? APIError block.

TL;DR

  • Three Brotein SwiftUI ViewModels collided on the same error-handling block; Claude resolves all three.
  • Decision rule: keep local user-friendly switch-on-APIError arm, drop remote's terse apiError.localizedDescription arm.
  • Same dev session as the next screenshot (wrong cwd git add failure).

brotein · swiftui · anthropic claude · xcode · supabase

related.label: Brotein git rebase — wrong cwd `not a git repository`, then cd + stage + continue
